sourceMovie.title: Nacho Libre
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Nacho Libre (2006) as a comedy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Encanto
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Nacho Libre clicked for you, Encanto (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Nacho Libre?
faq.answer: Try Encanto, The A-Team, DodgeBall: A True Underdog Story—each shares DNA with Nacho Libre while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Nacho Libre?
faq.answer: Nacho Libre (2006) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Nacho Libre worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
